signals.raw:
Cavaliers Take 2-0 Series Lead Over Raptors in Eastern Conference First Round After Game 2 Win** | YES | HIGH  
The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2 on Monday, securing a 2-0 lead in their Eastern Conference first-round playoff series, with Donovan Mitchell (30 points), James Harden (28 points), and Evan Mobley (25 points) combining for 83 points.[1][3]
